context: Tests whether the agent computes the repeat_lift metric for each entry product, correctly classifies dead-end products (high entry count, low repeat_lift) and hidden gems (lower entry count, high repeat_lift), builds the cross-sell affinity table, and structures the output with all required sections.

checklist.name: Repeat lift metric computed
checklist.description: Report computes and displays a 'repeat lift', 'repeat %', or equivalent metric (repeat_customers / entry_customers) for each entry product

checklist.name: Dead-ends section
checklist.description: Report includes a 'Dead ends' section identifying products with high entry counts but low repeat lift (Kids Craft Explorer Box should appear here given 1/8 customers repeat)

checklist.name: Hidden gems section
checklist.description: Report includes a 'Hidden gems' section identifying products with lower entry counts but above-average repeat lift (Digital Art Tablet Starter or Brush Upgrade Set should appear here)

checklist.name: Cross-sell affinity table
checklist.description: Report includes a cross-sell affinity table showing what products customers most commonly buy on their second order after each entry product

checklist.name: Entry products table
checklist.description: Report includes an entry products table showing first-order count per product and percentage of new customers

checklist.name: Repeat drivers table
checklist.description: Report includes a repeat drivers table ranking entry products by repeat % or repeat lift with comparison to average

checklist.name: Top products baseline
checklist.description: Report includes a baseline table of top products by revenue (sourced from top_products_revenue.json data)

checklist.name: TL;DR section
checklist.description: Report opens with a TL;DR identifying top entry product, biggest repeat driver, and biggest dead end

checklist.name: Prioritized recommendations
checklist.description: Report includes prioritized recommendations (P0/P1/P2 or equivalent) with merchandising and marketing actions

checklist.name: Caveats section
checklist.description: Report includes a Caveats section noting sampling limitations or other caveats applicable to the analysis
